expectations.text: Identifies the Samsung first-load crash as a known issue
expectations.evidence: Section 4: 'Samsung's One UI has aggressive battery and memory optimization that can kill apps during initialization'

expectations.text: Suggests using adb logcat to get crash logs for diagnosis
